sale_confirmed: An rubuta. Ka sayar da {item} {quantity} {unit}, {currency} {total_amount}. Riba: {currency} {profit}. Stock: {remaining_stock} {unit}.
sale_low_stock_warning: An rubuta. Amma {item} ya rage — sai {remaining_stock} {unit} ya saura!
sale_out_of_stock: An rubuta. Amma {item} ya ƙare! Ka sayo wani.
expense_confirmed: An rubuta. {category}: {currency} {amount}. Jimlar kashe kuɗi yau: {currency} {total_expenses_today}.
inventory_empty: Ba ka da kaya a stock tukuna.
daily_summary: Yau: Tallace-tallace {currency} {total_revenue}, Saye {currency} {total_cost}, Kashe kuɗi {currency} {total_expenses}. Riba: {currency} {net_profit}. Transactions {transaction_count}. Mafi kyawun kaya: {top_selling_item}.
daily_summary_comparison_up: Da kyau! Ya fi jiya da {profit_change_pct}%!
weekly_report: Wannan mako: Jimlar riba {currency} {total_profit}. Kowace rana {currency} {avg_daily_profit}. Rana mafi kyau: {best_day}. Transactions {total_transactions}.
credit_profile: A kwanaki {period_days} da suka wuce: average daily revenue {currency} {avg_daily_revenue}, average daily profit {currency} {avg_daily_profit}, active days {active_days}, consistency score {consistency_score}. Risk level: {risk_level}.
clarify: Ban fahimta ba. Don Allah ka sake faɗa.
photo_unclear: Ban iya ganin transaction sosai a hoton ba. Don Allah ka sake ɗauka.
error: Wani abu ya faru. Don Allah ka sake gwadawa.
welcome: Barka da zuwa Susu Books! Danna button kore sannan ka faɗa min game da kasuwancin ka.
